title: Host any coding agent on AgentCore
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore enables hosting and running multiple coding agents including Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Kiro. The service provides a unified platform for deploying various coding agents on AWS infrastructure.
writeup: This video demonstrates how Amazon Bedrock AgentCore hosts and runs multiple coding agents, including Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Kiro, on AWS infrastructure. It matters because it positions AgentCore as a unified platform for deploying different coding agents rather than tying teams to a single tool. The key takeaway: a range of coding agents can be deployed through one service on AWS.
